title: Orca FM Steward Risk Card v1
description: Structured risk-card request for the Mac FM steward classifier (Phase 3). Normative contract: planning handoff §6.1.

schema_version.description: Risk card schema version. Must be 1.

session_id.description: Caller session identifier for sticky / warm-session correlation.

tool.description: Logical tool name (bash, send_email, stub names OK).

command.description: Optional shell string when tool is shell-like; null for stub tools.

features.description: Structured feature flags and hints. additionalProperties allowed for forward-compat.

executed.description: False when text is data / grep / assignment, not execution.

bulk_outbound.description: Explicit bulk outbound flag (or derive from recipient_count ≥ threshold).

same_intent.description: Repeated safe intent label, e.g. test_loop.

amount.description: Monetary amount when tool is payment-like.

currency.description: ISO currency code when amount is set.

paths.description: Filesystem paths touched by the action.

rule_id.description: Optional matched rule identifier from pre-FM path.

thresholds.description: Caller-supplied threshold overrides; steward applies defaults if omitted.

bulk_recipient_min.description: Minimum recipient_count treated as bulk outbound.

vip_list_path.description: Optional path to VIP list for the steward.

cwd.description: Working directory at card build time.
